title: Python 3.13 Released – Key New Features
description: Python 3.13 brings improved error messages, experimental JIT compiler, and a new interactive interpreter. A must-know for every developer.

title: Junior Engineer Vacancy – KSEB Kerala
description: KSEB has announced 120 Junior Engineer vacancies for Electrical and Civil branches. Last date to apply: 30 June 2026.

title: Free VS Code Extension for Students
description: GitHub Copilot is now free for students. Activate it with your college email for AI-assisted coding in VS Code.

title: Kerala PSC Technical Education Notification
description: Kerala PSC released notification for Lecturer posts in Government Polytechnic Colleges. Degree + B.Ed required.
